conservative.name: Avalanche
conservative.requirements:
6 power
Must be either outdoors or within long range of a quantity of snow or ice

success.description: A location or area within medium range of you is buried under an avalanche of snow and ice
As above, and all creatures in that area suffer 2 fatigue, 2 stress, and 2 wounds

boon.description: You may exclude up to 2 creatures in the area from being affected by the avalanche

bane.description: The avalanche is out of control! It spreads far beyond the desired area

reckless.name: Avalanche
reckless.requirements:
6 power
Must be either outdoors or within long range of a quantity of snow or ice

success.description: A location or area within medium range of you is buried under an avalanche of snow and ice, knocking all creatures in that area prone and striking them for 2+ Intelligence damage

boon.description: Each creature in the avalanche gains the Sluggish condition until this spell recharges
You may exclude up to 2 creatures in the area from being affected by the avalanche

bane.description: The avalanche is out of control! It spreads far beyond the desired area

sigmarsComet.description: The entire area is chilled by snow and ice. For the duration of the encounter, you may treat the current season as winter
